curation_notes: Patch commit c5ee130 adds two null checks in new_aubio_notes (src/notes/notes.c): one after new_aubio_onset() and one after four buffer allocations (onset_output, pitch_output, note_buffer, note_buffer2). Only one source file changed. No sibling files in src/notes/ contain the same pattern (notes.h is a header). Pre-assigned class null-deref from CWE-476 is correct.
